case_title: JOSE D GAMINO VS. JOHN M GUTTENBEIL ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-03-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-23-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-03-2017 CONTINUED TO FEB-27-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAMINO, JOSE D AS TO DEFENDANT GUTTENBEIL, JOHN M DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-12-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-15-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-19-2017

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST GINO JOSEPH MOLINARI, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-03-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-20-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-12-2017 CONTINUED TO AUG-23-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-03-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61243688)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-27-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED (AMENDED) TO PLAINTIFF GAMINO, JOSE D
